expectations.text: Uses the prior conversation as context instead of restarting requirement discovery from scratch
expectations.evidence: It refers to '第一版这三类审批' and asks whether they should launch as fixed flow or configurable templates, which clearly continues the prior conversation.

expectations.text: Provides a pre-generation review that separates confirmed points from unresolved or risky items
expectations.evidence: It does not summarize confirmed items or list unresolved/risky items; it immediately asks another clarification question about fixed vs configurable approval flow.

expectations.text: Asks explicitly whether to begin final downstream-prompt generation instead of generating immediately after '差不多了'
expectations.evidence: After the user says '目前差不多了，你先继续', the response does not ask whether to begin generation; it keeps clarifying.

eval_feedback.overall: Useful late-stage eval. It surfaces a real gap: even with the skill, the model keeps clarifying instead of switching into review-and-authorization mode.
